SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.rupture

Class BlowdownPressureProfile

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.rupture.BlowdownPressureProfile
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class BlowdownPressureProfile extends Object implements Serializable
Blowdown pressure profile used by pipe fire-rupture calculations.

The profile stores absolute pressure versus time and can evaluate the pressure using either previous-point stepping or linear interpolation. Previous-point stepping matches the legacy spreadsheet behaviour where Excel VLOOKUP(..., TRUE) is used on the pressure table.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL

  • Constructor Details

    • BlowdownPressureProfile

      public BlowdownPressureProfile(List<Double> timeSeconds, List<Double> pressureBara, BlowdownPressureProfile.InterpolationMode interpolationMode, double gaugeOffsetBara)
      Creates a blowdown pressure profile.
      Parameters:
      timeSeconds - time points in seconds; must be increasing
      pressureBara - absolute pressures in bara; must be same length as time points
      interpolationMode - pressure interpolation mode; defaults to previous-point stepping when null
      gaugeOffsetBara - absolute-to-gauge pressure offset in bara; normally 1.0 for spreadsheet parity
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the profile is invalid

  • Method Details

    • fromMinutesAndBara

      public static BlowdownPressureProfile fromMinutesAndBara(double[] timeMinutes, double[] pressureBara)
      Creates a previous-point pressure profile from minute and bara arrays.
      Parameters:
      timeMinutes - profile times in minutes
      pressureBara - absolute pressure profile in bara
      Returns:
      pressure profile using previous-point stepping and 1 bara gauge offset

    • fromDepressurizationResult

      public static BlowdownPressureProfile fromDepressurizationResult(DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult result)
      Creates a pressure profile from a NeqSim depressurization result.

      This is the standard bridge between the transient VU-flash blowdown calculation and the pipe fire-rupture strain-rate model. The depressurization result stores time in seconds and pressure in bara, so no unit conversion is needed except for applying the profile interpolation mode.

      Parameters:
      result - depressurization result containing time and pressure trajectories
      Returns:
      pressure profile using previous-point stepping and 1 bara gauge offset
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the result or its time/pressure trajectory is invalid

    • fromDepressurizationResult

      public static BlowdownPressureProfile fromDepressurizationResult(DepressurizationSimulator.DepressurizationResult result, BlowdownPressureProfile.InterpolationMode interpolationMode)
      Creates a pressure profile from a NeqSim depressurization result.
      Parameters:
      result - depressurization result containing time and pressure trajectories
      interpolationMode - pressure interpolation mode to use when sampling between result points
      Returns:
      pressure profile using the supplied interpolation mode and 1 bara gauge offset
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the result or its time/pressure trajectory is invalid

    • builder

      public static BlowdownPressureProfile.Builder builder()
      Creates a profile builder.
      Returns:
      new builder

    • pressureBaraAt

      public double pressureBaraAt(double timeSecondsRequested)
      Gets pressure at a specified time.
      Parameters:
      timeSecondsRequested - requested time in seconds; must be non-negative
      Returns:
      pressure in bara
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if time is negative or not finite

    • pressureBargAt

      public double pressureBargAt(double timeSecondsRequested)
      Gets gauge pressure at a specified time.
      Parameters:
      timeSecondsRequested - requested time in seconds; must be non-negative
      Returns:
      pressure in barg

      Converts the pressure profile to a JSON-friendly map.
      Returns:
      ordered map representation

    • interpolate

      private static double interpolate(double x, double x0, double x1, double y0, double y1)
      Linearly interpolates a value.
      Parameters:
      x - requested x value
      x0 - lower x value
      x1 - upper x value
      y0 - lower y value
      y1 - upper y value
      Returns:
      interpolated y value

    • nearlyEqual

      private static boolean nearlyEqual(double first, double second)
      Checks whether two time values are nearly equal.
      Parameters:
      first - first value
      second - second value
      Returns:
      true when values are within a small absolute tolerance

    • validateNonNegative

      private static void validateNonNegative(double value, String name)
      Validates that a value is non-negative and finite.
      Parameters:
      value - value to validate
      name - parameter name for exception messages
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the value is invalid

    • validateProfile

      private static void validateProfile(List<Double> timeSeconds, List<Double> pressureBara, double gaugeOffsetBara)
      Validates pressure profile arrays.
      Parameters:
      timeSeconds - time points in seconds
      pressureBara - pressure points in bara
      gaugeOffsetBara - absolute-to-gauge offset in bara
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the profile is invalid
